scripts.fix: oxfmt --fix src/ extension/ scripts/ test/ && oxlint --fix src/ extension/ scripts/ test/
scripts.typecheck: bun scripts/run-typescript-compiler.ts --noEmit && bun scripts/run-typescript-compiler.ts -p extension/tsconfig.json && bun scripts/run-typescript-compiler.ts -p extension/background/tsconfig.json && bun scripts/run-typescript-compiler.ts -p tsconfig.tools.json
scripts.typecheck:native: bun scripts/run-typescript-compiler.ts --native-only --noEmit && bun scripts/run-typescript-compiler.ts --native-only -p extension/tsconfig.json && bun scripts/run-typescript-compiler.ts --native-only -p extension/background/tsconfig.json && bun scripts/run-typescript-compiler.ts --native-only -p tsconfig.tools.json
scripts.typecheck:tsc: tsc --noEmit && tsc -p extension/tsconfig.json && tsc -p extension/background/tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.tools.json
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && oxlint src/ extension/ scripts/ test/ && oxfmt src/ extension/ scripts/ test/
scripts.build: bun run build:cli && bun run build:chrome
